gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/218)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/218)
text: مَا مِنْ أَحَدٍ إِلَّا وَ فِيهِ عِرْقٌ مِنَ الْجُذَامِ فَأَذِيبُوهُ بِالسَّلْجَمِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Abdul Aziz Al Muhtady,
(It has been narrated) raising it to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is no one except inside of him is a vein of the leprosy, so melt it by the turnip’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from ‘Abd ‘Abd al-’Aziz al-Muhtadiy in a marfu‘ manner who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Everyone has a vein of leprosy, so you should dissolve it with turnips.’ ”
